Ad Text:
Elastic, the Search AI Company, enables everyone to find the answers they need in real time, using all their data, at scale — unleashing the potential of businesses and people. The Elastic Search AI Platform, used by more than 50% of the Fortune 500, brings together the precision of search and the intelligence of AI to enable everyone to accelerate the results that matter. By taking advantage of all structured and unstructured data — securing and protecting private information more effectively — Elastic’s complete, cloud-based solutions for search, security, and observability help organizations deliver on the promise of AI.

What is The Role:


Elastic, the Search Analytics company, is seeking a dynamic Senior Regional Services Partner. Elastic’s Professional Services team works across all our technologies and systems to deliver solutions for our customers. Our Regional Services Sales Partner for Australia-New Zealand Public Sector is essential in the growth of our Services business and plays an important role in growing our practice. You will have ownership of our customer's journeys from pre-sales to launch while building trusted relationships with departmental leads, CIOs, and digital transformation executives across Federal, State, and Local government.

Senior Regional Services Partner must be a strategic problem solver with exceptional enterprise, commercial, and cross-functional skills, demonstrate high energy and have strong technical sales management experience. Your primary responsibility is for Services Sales.

What You Will Be Doing:

Evangelize Elastic’s ability to deliver business outcomes and our delivery methodology to our customers. Create a compelling vision and clearly communicate Elastic solutions with the goal of generating significant success and business value for the customer's investment in Elastic
Apply industry expertise and business insight to understand government customer's motivation, business drivers, strategic goals and objectives, and desired business outcomes
Exceed growth and bookings targets, ensure organizational health, and drive customer satisfaction
Ability to create Enterprise services proposals, draft custom Scope of Work and engage customers, especially C-Level, using a consultative selling approach that positions Elastic and yourself as a long-term trusted advisor relationship
Develop and lead a territory plan and a personalized account plan for each customer, which aligns with their business goals.
Forecast accurately and timely, build a pipeline, and progress opportunities to deliver YOY growth
Form a strong relationship with the Sales, Customer Success organization, and regional Alliances/Partner organizations that are instrumental to success. You should be able to operate in a co-sell model, collaborate, and establish relationships
Participate in enhancing our service delivery methodology, services practice, and industry POV's
What You Bring:

Over 8 years of consultative sales experience, consistently exceeding quotas across large enterprise accounts.
More than 5 years of experience in selling and delivering professional services within strategic consulting firms, large-scale system integrators, or professional services divisions of software organizations.
Proven track record to build, nurture, and maintain C-level relationships, earning recognition as a trusted advisor.
Strong track record in expanding key accounts and managing complex, multi-million-dollar pursuits.
Highly collaborative professional who thrives in complex, matrixed organizational structures.
Expertise in developing compelling responses to both functional and technical components of RFIs and RFPs.
Demonstrated project and account management capabilities with a focus on results and client satisfaction.
Exceptional teammate with outstanding interpersonal and communication skills.
Thrives in fast-paced, dynamic environments, maintaining composure and delivering excellence under pressure.
Passion: Passionate about Customer Success
Beginner's Mind: Always learning, approaches each interaction with an open mind, a great listener, and hands-on
Thought Leadership: Strong point of view and executive presence. Confident, but not arrogant, a great storyteller
Urgency: Ability to move and adapt quickly and drive business value and results
Team Player: A great teammate that everyone enjoys working with and has a generous heart
Trust: Trust the company’s core values and have the ability to build trust with everyone you work with
Adaptability: Excels in high levels of uncertainty
Additional Information - We Take Care of Our People:


As a distributed company, diversity drives our identity. Whether you’re looking to launch a new career or grow an existing one, Elastic is the type of company where you can balance great work with great life. Your age is only a number. It doesn’t matter if you’re just out of college or your children are; we need you for what you can do.

We strive to have parity of benefits across regions, and while regulations differ from place to place, we believe taking care of our people is the right thing to do.

Competitive pay based on the work you do here and not your previous salary
Health coverage for you and your family in many locations
Ability to craft your calendar with flexible locations and schedules for many roles
Generous number of vacation days each year
Increase your impact - We match up to $2000 (or local currency equivalent) for financial donations and service
Up to 40 hours each year to use toward volunteer projects you love
Embracing parenthood with a minimum of 16 weeks of parental leave

Different people approach problems differently. We need that. About Us:
At CI&T, we're at the forefront of delivering complex digital products that shape the future. We are seeking a passionate Senior Technical Business Analyst to join our dynamic team and play a pivotal role in bridging the gap between product and engineering. If you're ready to take on new challenges and enhance your career in a supportive and innovative environment, we want to hear from you!

Key Responsibilities

Requirements & Scope Management: Collaborate with Product Owners, Tech Leads, and UX Designers to define product scope and translate business needs into actionable user stories.
Stakeholder Communication: Serve as a key liaison between product and engineering teams, ensuring clear communication regarding timelines, scope, and constraints.
Technical Expertise: Leverage your understanding of modern digital product delivery to manage dependencies, ensure backlog readiness, and facilitate successful sprint activities.

Key Requirements

Experience in a Business Analyst or Technical Business Analyst role within software delivery.
Proven track record in large technology companies or digital consulting environments.
Strong experience in delivering web and mobile applications, with familiarity in multi-system digital platforms (CMS, APIs, etc.).
Proficiency with Jira and Confluence, and experience in Agile/Scrum methodologies.
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills.
High level of organisation with a proactive solution oriented mindset
Ability to structure complex requirements and work effectively with distributed teams.

Nice-to-Have:

Experience working with cross-regional teams.
Scrum or Agile certifications.

Why CI&T

Innovative Culture: Work with cutting edge technology and embrace modern AI tools to streamline workflows and enhance productivity. Our commitment to artificial intelligence means you'll have the opportunity to leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI-assisted tools in your daily tasks, transforming how we clarify requirements, create user stories, and define acceptance criteria.
Pioneering AI Solutions: Be part of a team that is actively integrating AI into our digital products, allowing you to shape the future of technology. You'll be able to experiment with and implement AI strategies that optimize user experiences and enhance product functionality.
Collaborative Environment: Engage with a diverse team of professionals who value your insights and expertise while working on innovative solutions that push the boundaries of what's possible in AI.
Career Growth: Take your career to the next level with continuous learning and development opportunities, particularly in the rapidly evolving field of AI and machine learning.

Embrace the Future with Us!
If you're a motivated professional eager to make a difference in the world of digital products, apply now! Join CI&T and help us shape the future of technology.

Note: This position is only available to applicants with full working rights in Australia, we are unable to provide sponsorship for this role at this present time.
